conversation.content:
Plan:
Procedural city with parametric grid layout. Ground plane + array of building blocks on a regular grid. Building heights driven by deterministic pseudo-noise formula from grid coordinates. Street width and building footprint controlled by sliders. Multi-color rendering: ground, buildings as separate leaves.
SKELETON: curve "gridX" drives [building centers X coordinate series]; curve "gridY" drives [building centers Y coordinate series]; point "buildingCenters" drives [Box primitives for each building]
GENOME [procedural-city-grid, detail:medium]: ground shell; building repeated ×cityBlocks^2 on ground
Native tool-calling disabled for this agent (provider grammar error) — using the JSON protocol from now on.
IR program had compile errors (attempt 1/3) — asking the model to fix.
Response was not valid JSON (attempt 2/3) — asking the model to resend.
